title: ageratina areolaris
intro: Ageratina areolaris, also known as White Cloud, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting potential antiviral properties. Ageratina areolaris can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
